_note: ILLUSTRATIVE MOCK KNOWLEDGE BASE for the portability demo's second company, Ferngate Security.

articles.title: Can't log in / password reset not arriving
articles.answer: Password reset emails can take a few minutes and are sometimes caught by spam filters - check there first. If it's been over 15 minutes, an admin can trigger a manual reset.

articles.title: Scan flagged a false positive
articles.answer: False positives are usually caused by an outdated plugin signature - re-running the scan after the next signature update resolves most of these. If it persists, the specific CVE can be manually suppressed with a documented reason.

articles.title: SIEM integration stopped sending alerts
articles.answer: SIEM integrations most commonly stop after an API token expires or the receiving endpoint changed - reconnecting the integration from scratch in settings resolves the large majority of cases.

articles.title: Duplicate or unexpected charge
articles.answer: Duplicate charges are usually caused by an asset count change syncing twice in the same billing cycle - check the invoice line items and request a credit for the duplicate, issued automatically once confirmed.

articles.title: Cancel a subscription
articles.answer: A subscription can be cancelled any time from account settings, effective at the end of the current billing cycle - scan history remains accessible until then.

articles.title: Close account
articles.answer: Closing an account stops all future billing at the end of the current cycle and retains scan history for the legally required retention period before deletion.
